name: Tempered Clear Glass (Heat-Toughened), 8mm
description: Heat-toughened clear glass for windows, skylights, and residential/commercial facades. Balanced strength with reliable edge finishing for safe installation.

name: Tempered Green Tinted Glass, 10mm
description: Green tinted tempered glass designed for glare reduction and privacy. Suitable for facades, balcony glazing, and high-impact exterior applications.

name: Laminated Clear Safety Glass (PVB), 10mm (5+5)
description: Clear laminated safety glass with PVB interlayer. Holds together under breakage, commonly used for partitions, balustrades, and doors where safety is critical.

name: Laminated Bronze Tinted Safety Glass, 12mm (6+6)
description: Bronze tinted laminated safety glass for premium aesthetics and solar control. Ideal for sun-facing facades, canopies, and high-safety applications.

name: Float Clear Glass, 6mm
description: Standard float clear glass for non-safety uses like internal screens, display panels, and secondary glazing where tempered/laminated is not required.

name: Low-Iron Tempered Glass, 6mm
description: Low-iron tempered glass with higher light transmittance and reduced green tint. Excellent for premium storefronts and architectural glazing.

name: Patterned Privacy Glass (Frosted/Satin), 6mm
description: Satin/frosted patterned glass for office partitions and privacy screens. Provides diffused light while masking silhouettes from certain angles.

name: Reflective Solar Control Low-E Glass, 6mm
description: Reflective solar control low-E glass that reduces heat gain. Suitable for offices and commercial windows where cooling load reduction matters.

name: Low-E Insulated Glass Unit (IGU), 24mm (6-12-6) Argon
description: Double-glazed insulated unit with argon and low-E coatings for improved thermal performance. Ideal for energy-efficient buildings and facades.

name: Insulated Heat-Strengthened Unit, 28mm (8-12-8)
description: Insulated heat-strengthened unit built for balanced durability and insulation. Suitable for residential windows and commercial curtain-wall modules.

name: Fire-rated Glass, 20mm (E60) Lamination Pack
description: Certified fire-rated glass assembly for partitions and doors. Designed to maintain integrity and heat resistance during fire exposure.

name: Laminated Acoustic Glass, 12mm (6.4-0.76-5.8)
description: Acoustic laminated glass with sound-reducing interlayers. Used for office meeting rooms, hospitals, and traffic-exposed sites.

name: Toughened Smoke Grey Glass, 8mm
description: Smoke grey toughened glass for privacy and sun control. Common for balustrades, stair glazing, and modern interiors.

name: Insulated Soundproof Unit, 32mm (10-12-10)
description: Thick insulated unit intended for higher acoustic and thermal performance. Best for airports, highways, and noise-sensitive buildings.

name: Tempered Clear Glass, 4mm (Architectural Grade)
description: Architectural tempered clear glass for lighter structural applications and modern interior panels where thin, strong glass is required.
